notes: The game launches ok. It shows the menu you can change settings and all. On the VR headset shows the view that it's supposed to and let you move the camera with no problem. The moment you want to start playing it gets stucked in the loading screen and close itself. Tried with ALVR (needed to use Xorg since I can't get it to work on Wayland), and WiVRn. Both cases same result. I could be doing something wrong but didn't find what. I ran other games same way I did with this one and had no problem

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6750 XT (radeonsi, navi22, LLVM 18.1.8, DRM 3.57, 6.9.12-1-MANJARO)
notes: since the update pushed 26/11/25 it's working, it used to freeze at loading screen, now we can play, and we got online multiplayer!
